name: trip-pwa

scripts.build:japan: node scripts/extract-japan-html.mjs && node scripts/assemble-japan-guide.mjs && node scripts/extract-japan-assets.mjs && TRIP_TEMPLATE=trip-templates/examples/japan-2026-guide.json TRIP_SLUG=japan-2026-guide node scripts/build-trip.mjs

description: Static TripPWA build from TripTemplate JSON/JSONC. No npm dependencies.
